entries.title: Staging-Prod Visual Route Diff
entries.notes: Leverages Chrome's network interception to shadow-test staging routes against production responses. One engineer can build this in 3 weeks by recording HAR files and comparing responses. No competitor offers this browser-native approach.
entries.pain: Engineers waste time manually diffing staging vs production behavior when routes diverge unexpectedly

entries.title: PR Review Load Balancer Suggestor
entries.notes: Integrates with GitHub/GitLab to analyze reviewer bandwidth and PR urgency, suggesting optimal reviewer assignment. Built as a Chrome extension, it overlays suggestions directly on the PR page. Growing demand as distributed teams struggle with review bottlenecks.
entries.pain: Senior devs get bottleneck-review requests while junior devs sit idle, slowing down the whole team

entries.title: Kafka Consumer Lag Alert Panel
entries.notes: Polls Kafka REST API or JMX metrics directly from a browser panel. Simple to build with existing charting libraries. Targets the underserved developer-internal tooling market where expensive APM tools dominate.
entries.pain: Developers miss Kafka consumer lag spikes until they cause production incidents, lacking real-time visibility

entries.title: Competitor Changelog Pulse Monitor
entries.notes: Scrapes competitor changelog pages and news feeds, alerting on new releases. One engineer can build the scraper and notification system in 4 weeks. Direct response to sales teams' demand for competitive intelligence tools.
entries.pain: Sales teams miss competitor feature releases until deals are lost, lacking proactive intelligence

entries.title: GCP Idle Resource Auto-Scheduler
entries.notes: Scans GCP console for idle resources, suggests shutdown schedules, and can auto-shutdown with approval. Chrome extension approach works well since developers already live in the browser console.
entries.pain: GCP bills balloon from dev resources left running 24/7 with no ownership or cleanup process

entries.title: LLM Output Plagiarism Detector
entries.notes: Checks AI-generated text against search engine results to flag potential overlap. Leverages existing plagiarism APIs for comparison. Niche but growing market as AI writing becomes ubiquitous.
entries.pain: Users of AI writing tools worry whether outputs are original but lack easy verification

entries.title: EU Traffic GDPR Consent Tracker
entries.notes: Monitors consent management platform events and reports on consent rates by region. Built as an overlay on analytics dashboards. GDPR compliance monitoring is a growing pain point post-2024 regulations.
entries.pain: Marketing teams lack visibility into whether EU visitors actually consent to tracking, risking compliance

entries.title: Calendar Focus Block Optimizer
entries.notes: Analyzes calendar patterns to suggest optimal focus block consolidation and protects them from meeting invites. Simple calendar API integration makes this buildable quickly.
entries.pain: Knowledge workers struggle to find uninterrupted focus time because their calendar is fragmented into useless chunks

entries.title: Memory Leak Hotspot Detector
entries.notes: Monitors page heap growth over time and highlights components with disproportionate allocation growth. Uses Chrome's DevTools Protocol for memory sampling. Targets a specific, painful developer workflow.
entries.pain: Performance engineers spend hours profiling to find memory leaks that are obvious in hindsight

entries.title: Sales Prospect Funding Round Alert
entries.notes: Monitors Crunchbase/News APIs for funding announcements of companies in CRM. Pushes alerts when warm prospects raise money. Strong value prop for sales teams doing account-based outreach.
entries.pain: Sales reps miss optimal outreach timing when prospects close funding rounds, losing urgency advantages

entries.title: OpenAPI Spec Compliance Checker
entries.notes: Validates live API responses against OpenAPI specs and flags mismatches in real-time. Uses a lightweight validation library and displays results as an overlay. Addresses the spec-drift problem plaguing API-first teams.
entries.pain: Backend teams ship APIs that don't match their OpenAPI spec, breaking frontend contracts

entries.title: WebPage Dynamic Content Auditor
entries.notes: Audits pages for dynamic content loading patterns and flags elements that search crawlers might miss. Provides actionable recommendations for dynamic rendering solutions. Directly addresses Google's dynamic rendering requirements.
entries.pain: SEO teams miss indexing issues when pages load content dynamically without server-rendered fallbacks
